title: calophyllum poilanei
intro: Calophyllum poilanei, also known as the Calophyllum poilanei tree or "Poilane's Calophyllum", is a plant species in the family Calophyllaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities, which are attributed to its high content of calophyllolide and other lignans. The health benefits of Calophyllum poilanei include its potential to treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and infections, as well as its use as an anti-oxidant and anti-inflammatory agent. In traditional medicine, Calophyllum poilanei is often prepared as an extract or tincture, and can also be made into a poultice or salve for topical application.
